title: Registry Definitions
description: Schema for rules_agents registry definition files.

id.description: Stable registry identifier, unique within one file and within the merged config.

display_name.description: Human-readable name used by listing output. Defaults to id.

homepage.description: Canonical documentation or repository page for the registry.

repo_url.description: Canonical repository URL used for rendering source links and update checks.

archive_url.description: Archive URL used for fetch and discovery. Maintainers should pin it with update_registries.

strip_prefix.description: Optional extracted archive root to strip before skill discovery.

default_branch.description: Optional branch name used only by the update tool when looking for newer upstream commits.

agents.description: Subset of supported agents used for filtering.

skill_path_prefix.description: Optional relative path under the extracted archive root where skill discovery begins.

link_format.description: Source-link rendering convention. v1 supports only github_tree.
